texto: Guilt is one side of a nasty triangle
autor: the other two are shame and stigma. This grim coalition combines to inculpate women themselves of the crimes committed against them.
explicacao: Citação de the other two are shame and stigma. This grim coalition combines to inculpate women themselves of the crimes committed against them. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Guilt is one side of a nasty triangle” articula reflexao, germaine-greer, guilt em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
